info.title: PolyNode API
info.description: Real-time Polymarket data API with decoded mempool settlements, historical trade database, OHLCV candles, and full Polygon JSON-RPC proxy.

get.description: Liveness probe. Returns 200 OK if the server is running.
Returns 200 if node is connected and Redis is reachable, 503 otherwise.

post.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 proxy supporting standard eth_*/net_* methods (forwarded to full Polygon node with caching) and custom pn_* methods (served from in-memory state). Supports single and batch requests (max 100 per batch).

requestBody.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 request (single object or array for batch)

get.description: Returns OHLCV price candles for a token at the specified resolution.
Returns the midpoint price for a token from the Polymarket CLOB, enriched with market metadata.
Proxies to the Polymarket CLOB order book, enriched with market metadata.
Returns the bid-ask spread for a token from the Polymarket CLOB, enriched with market metadata.

post.description: Generates a new API key. Rate limited to 1 per IP per day. The key is returned only once and cannot be retrieved again.

get.description: Returns top markets sorted by 24-hour volume. Only includes markets with activity in the last 24 hours. Use `/v1/markets/list?active_only=false` for all markets.
Looks up a market by its Polymarket condition ID. Returns full metadata, all token IDs with prices, and outcome prices.
Returns a filtered, paginated list of markets. Supports sorting, category filtering, and volume thresholds.

parameters.name: active_only
parameters.description: Only markets with trades in the last hour (defaults to true)

get.description: Looks up a market by its URL slug. Returns full metadata, all token IDs with prices, and outcome prices.
Returns detailed market data for a specific token ID, including metadata, liquidity, and description.
Full-text search across all market questions. Sub-millisecond response times. Closed markets are excluded by default.

parameters.name: include_inactive
parameters.description: Include closed/inactive markets in results (defaults to false)

get.description: Returns the most recent decoded settlements (pending + confirmed) from the mempool and confirmed blocks.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of settlements to return (default 100, max 1000)

get.description: Returns settlements for a specific Polymarket token ID.
Returns settlements involving a specific wallet address.
Returns market statistics including last price, 24h volume, and 24-hour OHLCV derived from hourly candles.
Returns system status including node connectivity, uptime, stream lengths, and state engine summary.
Returns activity summary for a wallet address including trade count, volume, transfers, and deposits.
Returns wallet positions from Polymarket, enriched with market metadata.
Returns wallet trade history from Polymarket, enriched with market metadata.

200.description: Wallet trade history with market metadata

get.description: Returns the current state of the historical trades database: total trade count, block range, date range, and number of Parquet files.

Search and filter every Polymarket trade ever executed. Supports filtering by token, wallet, exchange, side, slug, time range, block range, and minimum size. Results are paginated and sorted by timestamp.

parameters.name: token_id
parameters.description: Filter by conditional token ID (uint256 string). Returns only trades for this specific market outcome.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Filter by wallet address (matches both maker and taker). Case-insensitive.

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Filter by trade side (from maker's perspective).

parameters.name: from_ts
parameters.description: Start of time range (Unix timestamp in seconds).

parameters.name: to_ts
parameters.description: End of time range (Unix timestamp in seconds).

parameters.name: from_block
parameters.description: Start of block range (Polygon block number).

parameters.name: to_block
parameters.description: End of block range (Polygon block number).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip (for pagination).

get.description: Get OHLCV (open, high, low, close, volume) candles for a specific token from the full historical dataset. Supports resolutions from 1 minute to 1 week. Unlike v1 candles (which use recent Redis data), v2 candles cover all time since the market's first trade.

parameters.name: from_ts
parameters.description: Start of time range (Unix timestamp in seconds).

parameters.name: to_ts
parameters.description: End of time range (Unix timestamp in seconds).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of candles to return.

get.description: Get trading volume aggregated over time intervals. Optionally filter by token or wallet. Returns volume, notional value, trade count, and unique token count per interval.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Filter by wallet address (matches both maker and taker).

parameters.name: from_ts
parameters.description: Start of time range (Unix timestamp in seconds).

parameters.name: to_ts
parameters.description: End of time range (Unix timestamp in seconds).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of intervals to return.

get.description: Get aggregate trading statistics for a wallet address across all time. Includes total trades, buy/sell breakdown, volume, average price/size, number of unique markets, and first/last trade timestamps.

Get aggregate trading statistics for a specific conditional token (market outcome). Includes total trades, volume, price range, unique wallets, and enriched market metadata (question, outcome, slug, category).

BlockEvent.description: Summary of a new confirmed block with Polymarket-relevant stats.

timestamp.description: Candle bucket start timestamp (ms, floored to resolution).

DecodedTrade.description: Decoded trade information from a matchOrders transaction.

EventStatus.description: Status of an event — pending (mempool) or confirmed (in a block).

Exchange.description: Which exchange contract emitted the event.

MarketState.description: Live state for a single market (identified by token ID).

last_price.description: Last traded price (0-1 for binary, varies for multi-outcome).

last_status.description: Last known event status for this market.

PositionChangeEvent.description: Token transfer from the Conditional Tokens (ERC-1155) contract.

SettlementEvent.description: A decoded settlement event from matchOrders calldata.

timestamp.description: Normalized timestamp (alias for detected_at). Present on all event types for consistent access.

event_title.description: Parent event title if this market is part of a group.

StatusUpdateEvent.description: Notification that a previously-pending settlement is now confirmed.

latency_ms.description: Time from pending detection to block confirmation (ms).

TradeEvent.description: A confirmed trade from OrderFilled event log on CTF Exchange.

WalletActivity.description: Activity summary for a tracked wallet.

trade_count.description: Number of trades in tracking window.

HistoricalTrade.description: A single historical trade (decoded OrderFilled event).

block_number.description: Polygon block number where the trade was confirmed.

price.description: Fill price (0-1 range for binary markets).

HistoricalCandle.description: An OHLCV candle from historical trade data.

bucket.description: Candle start time (Unix timestamp in seconds).

trades.description: Number of trades in this candle.

VolumeInterval.description: Volume data for a single time interval.

bucket.description: Interval start time (Unix timestamp in seconds).

notional.description: Total notional value (volume * price, in USDC).

WalletStats.description: Aggregate trading statistics for a wallet.

TokenStats.description: Aggregate trading statistics for a conditional token (market outcome).

HistoricalStatus.description: Status of the historical trades database.

total_trades.description: Total number of trades in the database.
